# DeviceActivityData.User.FamilyRole

**Enumeration**

Role of a person in their iCloud family.

## Declaration

```swift
enum FamilyRole
```

## Overview

If the person is not signed into an iCloud account or in an iCloud family, they are an individual.

## Defining family roles

- **DeviceActivityData.User.FamilyRole.individual**: A person who has authorized your app.
- **DeviceActivityData.User.FamilyRole.child**: A child being managed by a parent or guardian in their iCloud family.

## Defining the account role

- **role**: Access the role of the person.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
